source.notes: Starter template for extracting softwareFactoryVscode from factory. Replace placeholders with the exact source ref and finalized path decisions during execution.

include.notes: Neutralize workspace-specific naming while preserving MCP wiring, task expectations, and auto-approve behavior.
Retain reusable setup, validation, runtime, and maintenance tasks only.
Keep the neutralized extension recommendation matrix.
Preserve reusable package-owned Copilot config and projection inputs.
Retain reusable workflow and policy skills only.
Keep thin reusable discovery wrappers, not Factory-specific policy bodies.
Extract reusable MCP services and update imports/paths as needed.
Carry over approval gate runtime implementation if part of the final package profile.
Include only if deterministic local validation remains part of the package contract.
Keep only runtime-relevant orchestration code; exclude Factory-specific training or repo-specific issue logic.
Carry over required Dockerfiles and support assets for the packaged runtime.
Normalize compose files under compose/ and unify env variable usage.
Retain reusable defaults only; keep live secrets out of versioned files.
Authoritative external dependency and remote GitHub contract.
Operator runbook for executing the extraction.

exclude.reason: Factory application backend, not part of the reusable factory package.
Explicit non-goal and product-specific client dependency.
Historical source planning artefact; keep only if cited in migration docs.
Historical source planning artefact; extract decisions into canonical docs instead of copying verbatim.
Host/project content area, not part of the standalone factory package.
